description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The exterior features a mix of brick and siding, with red window shutters adding a touch of color. The front yard includes a paved driveway leading to an attached garage, and the landscaping is enhanced by several trees and shrubs. At the rear, there is a wooden deck with outdoor furniture and a small swimming pool, providing a recreational space. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, while the back features sliding glass doors opening to the deck. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern American Colonial style, blending traditional and contemporary elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, front porch, attached garage, and landscaped yard. Features include brick and siding exterior, red shutters, a rear deck with a pool, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch with columns, attached garage, driveway, and symmetrical windows with red shutters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, outdoor furniture, swimming pool, and sliding glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, pool, and the side of the house with visible landscaping and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Front porch with columns, steps, overhang, and a central door flanked by windows and decorative shutters.
